name: Undescended Twinkies
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve the Jell-O in the boiling water.
2. Add the pineapple juice, ice cream, and 7-Up to the mixture. Mix thoroughly, using a blender if necessary to dissolve the ice cream.
3. Pour the mixture into a deep pan that is approximately 9-inches square.
4. Chill until the mixture begins to set.
5. Lay the Twinkies flat side down in two rows of four across the top of the chilled gelatin.
6. If the gelatin is properly chilled, it will resist the Twinkies. Push them in gently so they slowly rise but are not buried completely.
7. Chill until fully set and serve.
